sql_array: CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, XMLVAL XMLType);
UPDATE TEST_XMLS SET XMLVAL = XMLType('<emp><empno>222</empno><ename>Jane</ename></emp>') WHERE I = 1;
SELECT XMLVAL.getClobVal() AS XML_CONTENT FROM TEST_XMLS WHERE I = 1;
SELECT XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getClobVal() AS ENAME FROM TEST_XMLS WHERE XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno');
